hero.headline: Concrete That *Actually* Lasts
hero.subheadline: From driveways to foundations — we pour it right the first time.

services_section.label: WHAT WE POUR
services_section.heading: Every Pour Matters
services_section.subheading: From your driveway to your foundation — we get it level, strong, and finished right.

services.title: Driveways & Walkways
services.description: Smooth pours that handle West Virginia weather and heavy loads. Proper drainage built in.

services.title: Foundation Work
services.description: Level foundations and basement floors. We dig it right and pour it stronger.

services.title: Patios & Slabs
services.description: Backyard patios and garage slabs. Reinforced concrete that won't crack or settle.

services.title: Concrete Repair
services.description: Fix cracks, level sunken sections, and restore old concrete to working condition.

about.heading: Built for Huntington
about.body: We're a Huntington concrete team that shows up when we say we will. One call gets you real answers and honest pricing.

reviews.name: Elizabeth S.
reviews.text: Incredibly responsive and reasonably priced. Could not be happier with the quality of their work and would recommend them to anyone.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving the Tri-State
service_areas.subheading: Concrete services throughout Huntington and surrounding communities.

cta.heading: Ready to Pour Your Project?
cta.body: Get a straight answer and honest quote. No games, no surprises.
